pythonPath.description: System Python path — used only during first-time venv bootstrap. Leave blank to auto-detect (searches pyenv, Homebrew, system Python).
pythonPath.detectFailed: Still no Python 3 found — please specify a path manually.

uiLanguage.description: Interface language. 'auto' follows your OS locale; Chinese systems get Traditional Chinese, everything else gets English.

model.description: Whisper model to use. Larger models are more accurate but slower and bigger. Only models already downloaded from the Models tab appear here.

models_dir.description: Directory where model weights are downloaded. Leave blank to use the system default (macOS: Application Support; Windows: %APPDATA%).

device.description: Inference device. 'auto' picks CUDA if available, otherwise CPU. macOS currently runs on CPU.

compute_type.description: Model precision. 'auto' picks based on device. int8 is fastest and uses the least memory; float16 is slightly higher quality; float32 is the most accurate but most resource-hungry.

vad.description: Voice activity detection strategy. The silero-vad variants cut out speech segments before transcribing, which is much faster and reduces hallucinations; 'none' sends the entire file to Whisper.

vad_merge_window.description: Silence merge window (seconds). Two speech segments separated by less than this gap are merged into one, preventing over-segmentation.

vad_max_merge_size.description: Maximum merged-segment length (seconds). Segments longer than this get split so Whisper never receives an over-long chunk.

vad_padding.description: Padding (seconds) added before and after each detected speech segment, so the first/last word isn't clipped.

vad_prompt_window.description: Cross-segment prompt window (seconds). Whisper will be fed the last N seconds of the previous segment as context, helping it keep terminology consistent.

language.description: Target language. Leave blank to let Whisper auto-detect; specifying a language usually gives more stable output.

initial_prompt.description: Initial prompt. A starting string fed to Whisper — useful for forcing specific vocabulary, writing system (e.g. Traditional vs. Simplified Chinese), or tone. Selecting a language auto-fills a sensible default.

initial_prompt_mode.description: How the prompt is applied. prepend_all_segments: every segment; prepend_first_segment: only the first; json_prompt_mode: read per-segment prompts from a JSON file.

media_root_path.description: Folder to scan for media. Scan recursively finds every video/audio file under this directory that doesn't already have a matching subtitle.

media_file_name.description: The current file's name. Automatically populated by the queue — you don't usually need to edit this.

media_file_path.description: Full path of the current file. Automatically populated by the queue — you don't usually need to edit this.

missing_count.description: Files remaining from the last scan. Automatically updated by the queue.
